creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

It seems as though there was a communication problem between the 
submitter and the maintainer.  The maintainer wants to keep this port, 
although he is a bit behind.  Since there is no patch included that we 
could use as a basis of a maintainer-timeout, there is really nothing 
to do here.
